sections.paragraph:
Original: ירמוּת

Transliteration: yarmûth

Phonetic: yar-mooth'

BDB Definition:

Jarmuth = "heights"
  1. a Canaanitish city in the lowlands of Judah with a king and located between Hebron and Lachish
  2. a Levitical city of Issachar allocated to the Gershonite Levites

Origin: from H7311

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
